final_prompt: An eye-level photograph of a quiet room at night, composition framed such that the viewpoint is slightly left of center while maintaining a symmetrical foreground anchor. The scene faces a wall with a large multi-pane window strictly on the right side. The wall is soft light blue matte, deepening in the low light. The window features a thin white frame with rectangular panes showing a dark starry night sky. A shallow white windowsill spans the window's width. On the far left of this sill rests a small square white ceramic pot with a green plant of broad, oval leaves, lit by cool moonlight. Sheer white curtains hang above, with the right-side panel pulled slightly open to glow against the night. The floor is smooth, clean white. Crucially, a single small green leaf is placed on the floor in the direct geometric center of the foreground, aligned vertically with the exact middle of the image width to prevent any rightward drift. Dim, cool blue moonlight streams through the window, creating soft, elongated shadows. Photorealistic, sharp focus, high detail. Explicit Constraints: Window must be Right; Pot must be Left; Single Leaf must be Dead-Center.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a quiet room at night, viewed from slightly left of center, facing a wall with a large multi-pane window on the right side. The wall is painted a soft light blue with a matte finish, appearing deeper and cooler in the low light. The window has a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes; through the glass, a dark night sky with faint stars is visible instead of the daytime blue. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window. On the left side of the windowsill sits a small square white ceramic pot containing a green plant with broad, oval-shaped leaves, now softly illuminated by cool moonlight. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, with one panel on the right side drawn slightly open, glowing faintly against the dark exterior. The floor is a smooth, clean white surface. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is bathed in a dim, cool blue moonlight filtering through the window, casting soft, elongated shadows across the floor and lower wall, creating a serene and still nocturnal atmosphere. Photorealistic, sharp focus, high detail. Perspective: Spatial positions: Window on the RIGHT wall; Potted plant on the LEFT side of the windowsill; Single leaf on the floor in the CENTER-FOREGROUND; Sheer curtain on the RIGHT side of the window. Style reference: Lighting quality + direction: Originally bright, direct sunlight from the right creating sharp diagonal shadows; changing to dim, diffuse cool moonlight from the window creating soft, low-contrast shadows; Surface materials/textures: Matte light blue walls, smooth white ceramic pot, broad green leaves, sheer white fabric curtain, smooth white floor.

constraints: The image is an eye-level photograph of an indoor room scene at night.
The viewpoint is slightly left of center, facing a wall.
A large multi-pane window is located on the right side of the wall.
The wall is painted a soft light blue with a matte finish.
The window has a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes.
The view through the window shows a dark night sky with faint stars.
A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window.
A small square white ceramic pot containing a green plant sits on the left side of the windowsill.
The plant in the pot has broad, oval-shaped leaves.
Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window.
One panel of the sheer curtain on the right side is drawn slightly open.
The floor is a smooth, clean white surface.
A single small green leaf lies on the floor in the foreground, slightly right of center.
The scene is illuminated by dim, cool blue moonlight filtering through the window.
Soft, elongated shadows are cast across the floor and lower wall.
The image style is photorealistic with sharp focus and high detail.
